_comment: Maps each league member (canonical identity) to their team names across xlsx, Sleeper, and Yahoo. roster_id is the Sleeper roster_id (stable 2023+). xlsx_nickname is the short name used in MONEY_LEAGUE.xlsx 'Team' column. yahoo_team_names is keyed by season since members rename teams every year. confidence: high = directly matched via display_name or persistent Yahoo name; medium = inferred from xlsx nicknames and process of elimination; low = guess based on context. EDIT THIS FILE to fix mistakes.

yahoo_team_names._note: Brian first appears in FF2016 xlsx (not in FF2015). 2018+ confirmed via xlsx nickname 'Berger Boy Briga'. 2015 BergerBoy Brigade was actually Trevor's team (per FF2015 slot 10).
From 2019 onward Figgy used his nickname as team_name. 2015-2018 used silly one-off names.
Brower joined the league in 2019 (not in FF2015-2018 xlsx) and used 'Barry Sandals' consistently.
Ankur joined late (FF2022 payment row '0.0' dues = new member). Only 1 Yahoo year before Sleeper migration.
Troy was in FF2015-2024 xlsx. 'Tyrodasaurus Rex' appeared 2015-2016 only — Tyrod was a popular meme so this could be Troy's pun on his own name. Post-2016 Troy used different team names.
Used 'Guap Gang' 2019-2021. Skipped 2022 Yahoo (or used different name).
Eric was in FF2015-2024 xlsx and used 'Deez Hos Ain't Royal' as a persistent Yahoo team_name 2015-2018. Likely continued under different name 2019-2022.
Tim first appears in FF2017 xlsx. 'Arnold Palmer Lite' was a persistent Yahoo team 2016-2018 — possibly Tim or Nark (Nark used it in 2016, then was gone by 2017, so Tim may have inherited the name).
Donnie was in FF2015-2016 xlsx (likely left, then returned 2022+). 'Don's Special Guys' 2020 and 'Big Don's Cuties' 2015 both contain 'Don' which fits.

josh_wildboy.canonical_name: Josh (Wi1dboy, took over Dave's roster in 2025)

previous_owner.active_seasons: 2017-2024 (xlsx); 2023-2024 (Sleeper rid 10 as wvw5022 / 'Dave on Montgomery Ave')

yahoo_team_names_guess.2017: Fuck the Process? (slot 7 in FF2017 = Dave)
yahoo_team_names_guess._note: Dave first appears FF2017. Yahoo team_names 2018+ unknown — could be 'Land of the Freemans' 2018, 'The Dream Team' 2019-2022 (the only persistent Yahoo team across those years that hasn't been claimed).

yahoo_team_names._note: Pre-2023 Yahoo names not yet matched

trevor.sleeper_display_name: (not on current Sleeper roster — left the league?)

unmatched_xlsx_nicknames: Mrs Doubtfire (FF2018 only — likely a Yahoo team_name used as nickname for one year)
Trevor (FF2015-2022 xlsx, not on current Sleeper)
unmatched_yahoo_persistent_names: The Dream Team (2017-2022) — best candidate: Dave (matches his 2017-2022 active years)
Weird Flex but OK (2019-2022) — could be Wang's continuation, or a member who left before Sleeper migration
Arnold Palmer Lite (2016-2018) — Tim or Nark (Tim joined 2017, Nark left 2017)

_high_confidence_summary.Eric: Deez Hos Ain't Royal 2015-2018 (then likely continued — needs lookup)
_high_confidence_summary.Lem: LEMVP & Associates (2015 + 2018), 'The pigeon outside Lems window' (2022)
_high_confidence_summary.Josh: No Yahoo years; replaced Dave in 2025 (Sleeper era only)
